Text

"Text" mane **text message** — mobile phone-eo send kora **short written message**.

- **Text message** = SMS, onek short written message mobile-e
- Onek app ache free text-korar jonno:  
  - **TextFree** — unlimited free texting + WiFi calling
  - **textPlus** — free texting + calling with real US number
  - **TextMe** — free unlimited texting & calling to US, Canada, 40+ countries
- **Google Messages for Web** diye computer-eo SMS/MMS/RCS message pathano jay

Tumi ki **free texting app** chay, ba **kisecu pathate chay**, ba **text message ki ta** bujhote chay?
